actions: Maintain strategic allocation with regular monitoring
Monitor regime transitions and factor z-scores weekly

Commodity Expansion.description: Commodity prices driving markets. Mining and resource sectors outperform.

Sovereign Stress.description: Elevated sovereign risk premiums. Political or fiscal uncertainty. High CDS spreads.

Stable Growth.description: Low volatility, positive returns. Markets trending upward with contained risk.

Systemic Crisis.description: Extreme volatility, VIX spike, CDS blowout, correlation surge. Systemic risk-off.

USD Tightening.description: USD strength pressuring EM currencies. Capital outflows, ZAR weakness.

stress.methodology: Factor-beta shock × 3-round correlation contagion, based on real historical z-score movements
